Borage (Borago officinalis) is an annual herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright blue flowers and edible leaves and seeds. The health benefits of Borage include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as support heart health. The bioactive constituents of Borage include boragine alkaloids, flavonoids, and gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which contribute to its medicinal properties.
